To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: Meridian — all under control

Hi R,

Quick update on Meridian so you're not worried going into the SC.

The test harness slipped past Friday but I don't want to make a thing of it — Marcus's team are clearly stretched and I'd rather keep the relationship positive than start pointing fingers over a few days. I'll just quietly absorb it in the plan and we'll catch up.

On CR-204 — it's £40k for some extra integration work. I had a look and it's a bit borderline against the SOW, but honestly £40k isn't huge in the scheme of the programme and pushing back risks souring things with Meridian right when we need them onside. I've approved it and sent it through so it doesn't become a friction point. Better to keep them happy and delivering than to nickel-and-dime them.

So nothing for you to action — I've smoothed both over.

PC
